title: HashPartitioner.java
description: This Java file defines a custom partitioner for Hadoop MapReduce, named HashPartitioner. It partitions keys based on their hash code, using the getPartition method which calculates the partition for a given key, value, and number of reduce tasks. The partition is determined by applying the hash code method to the key and then using bitwise AND with Integer.MAX_VALUE followed by a modulo operation with the number of reduce tasks. This class extends org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.Partitioner<K, V>, indicating it's a custom partitioner for MapReduce jobs, and imports necessary Hadoop annotations and classes for its functionality.
